name: Dopamine
description: Saturated maximalism. Y2K revival. Joyful, loud, electric. Maximum saturation, heavy type, gradient everything. The anti-minimal design language.
personality: pill + raised elevation + bouncy motion + thin borders + vivid gradients

decorators.dopamine-card: Pill-rounded card with vivid gradient border, raised shadow in magenta-tinted color, and white surface.
decorators.dopamine-badge: Neon-bright pill badge with gradient fill from primary to secondary, bold white text overlay.
decorators.dopamine-input: Rounded input with gradient focus ring cycling primary to accent, generous padding and bouncy scale on focus.
decorators.dopamine-glow: Background glow effect using radial gradient of primary and accent colors at 20% opacity behind elements.
decorators.dopamine-shimmer: Animated shimmer gradient sweeping left to right across element surface for loading or emphasis.

dopamine-card.description: Pill-rounded card with vivid gradient border, raised shadow in magenta-tinted color, and white surface.
dopamine-card.intent: Use for content containers that need maximum joyful energy. The gradient border and magenta shadow create the maximalist look.

dopamine-badge.description: Neon-bright pill badge with gradient fill from primary to secondary, bold white text overlay.
dopamine-badge.intent: Use for labels and status indicators that need to pop with maximum saturation. The gradient fill ensures badges are impossible to miss.

dopamine-input.description: Rounded input with gradient focus ring cycling primary to accent, generous padding and bouncy scale on focus.
dopamine-input.intent: Use for form inputs that should feel playful and energetic. The bouncy scale-up on focus adds a delightful micro-interaction.

dopamine-glow.description: Background glow effect using radial gradient of primary and accent colors at 20% opacity behind elements.
dopamine-glow.intent: Use as a background effect behind featured sections and hero areas. The dual-color glow creates depth and visual energy.

suggested_properties.background: radial-gradient(ellipse at center, rgba(255, 0, 229, 0.2), rgba(255, 234, 0, 0.1), transparent 70%)

dopamine-shimmer.description: Animated shimmer gradient sweeping left to right across element surface for loading or emphasis.
dopamine-shimmer.intent: Use for loading states and to add energetic motion to static surfaces. The shimmer matches the maximalist personality.
